name: Chinese Beef/Vegetable Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 package Ramen noodles plus beef flavor packet
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the beef and remove it from the pan.
2. Brown the onion and celery in the same pan.
3. Add the frozen vegetables, noodles, and beef flavor packet to the pan.
4. Pour in the water and cover the pan.
5. Simmer for 5 minutes.
6. Return the beef to the pan and stir in soy sauce if desired.
7. Serve.
